sourceName: U.S. Census ACS 2024 5-Year Housing Cost Burden - New York City Counties
notes: Official U.S. Census ACS 2020-2024 5-year Data Profile DP04 aggregate county estimates for owner and renter housing cost burden. Covers Bronx, Kings, New York, Queens, and Richmond counties. No individual addresses, names, income records, rent records, mortgage records, devices, or household-level records are imported.
